title: The Egghead Incident Begins
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Kaku, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Vegapunk, Saturn as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forget about the flames! The guy with the Hawk's eyes disappeared

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Where the hell did he go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like he changed the order of the killings

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He probably wants to deal with the more troublesome ones later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He wants to eliminate the weaklings first.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In this case, they may be your friends

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Taking them out first could shake the stronger ones.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: leave it up to me! I'll go after him!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: ZORO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey, usopp! Go with him, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He gets lost easily!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What a pain in the ass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait up, RORDONDA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And who're you callin' usopp?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hawk GATLING

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Go away flames

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Strawhat, you idiot, stop and think!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't beat it by just throwing out attacks like that

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was the day before the famous "egghead incident"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But this story...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ..began 3 months ago

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Holy Land Mary Geoise, three months prior

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm speaking from Egg- head Island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have some- thing I'd like to discuss with the higher-ups.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ZZT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dr. vegapunk is investigating the contents of the Void Century

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: CPS was dispatched in order to investigate the matter,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But no evidence was found.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: The ship that left egghead mysteriously disappeared.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For further investigation in an attempt to unravel the mystery, CP7, and CPR followed.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: But none returned to the government.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm speaking from Egghead, please connect me to the higher-ups.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
